description_long: This object is a rectangular, gray plastic cartridge resembling a classic video game cartridge, with a prominent label on the front. The label features bold, colorful graphics and text, including two stylized hourglasses set against a brown background. The cartridge has a series of vertical ridges along one side, likely for grip, and a recessed area on the back with vent-like slots. The edges are beveled, and the overall form is solid and compact, with no visible pages or paper. The object is reminiscent of retro gaming media, with a glossy printed label and molded plastic body.
description: A gray, rectangular plastic cartridge with a colorful label featuring hourglass graphics and bold text, resembling a retro video game cartridge.
description_view_0: The front view shows the colorful label with hourglass graphics and bold text, as well as the vertical ridges on the left side.
description_view_1: The rear angled view highlights the solid gray plastic back and the vent-like slots near the top edge.
description_view_2: This view shows the back of the cartridge, focusing on the vent-like slots and the smooth, unadorned surface.
description_view_3: Another front-angled view, showing the label, ridges, and the overall thickness of the cartridge.
attribute_cover_illustration: The main illustration features two stylized hourglasses, rendered in a simple, geometric style with blue and yellow coloring. The background is a solid brown, giving the cover a retro, minimalist appearance. No other prominent imagery is visible.
attribute_publisher_logo: A small, square black-and-white logo is visible on the lower left of the front cover, featuring a stylized 'R' and 'RATED' text.
